body: terraswallows:
reblog_comment:
STORY TIME!

back in 2020, when my now fiancée and I were first dating, one night, I decided to randomly send her the Konami Code, via emoji’s over text. And then, given our age gap, I had to explain what the Konami Code is. 🤦‍♀️ But the next day the plan had been for her to come over and watch the election together.

Several things ended up going wonky at the place she was staying at, so kept having to stay longer. And somewhere in there, we decided we liked it that way and they ended up moving in.

I, to this day claim, I unlocked them moving in with the Konami Code.
